name: TF141 | Wedding Party ALT
description:
💍 | Omegaverse Version | An old friend of 141 is getting married, and Price is very adamant about all of them going. Besides it being the polite thing to do, it’ll be good for morale.

Little did they know, that their old friend is marrying User’s cousin.

In the United States of America of all goddamn places.

Time to party.

The original can be found here.

User can be an alpha, beta, or omega. Go nuts. The boys are all alphas.

Make sure you specify what state/location you’re in. I left the bride and groom nameless so you guys can do whatever with them.

Tags: cod, call of duty, Kyle “Gaz” Garrick, Johnny “Soap” MacTavish, task force 141, TF 141, Simon “Ghost” Riley, John Price, omegaverse, alpha, omega, beta, rut, breeding

Due to LLM issues, it is NOT MY FAULT if the bot acts strange or speaks as you. That is not something I can fix.

Bot definition hidden due to poaching. I do NOT post my bots anywhere else, ONLY ON JANITOR.AI.
